text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I wander through these modern, brightly-lit halls. The minimalism and glass lend an air of transparency and openness, while the colorful, information-rich display excites my philosophical inclinations. I am reminded of the dance between order and innovation, and the ceaseless quest for meaning in spaces devoted to research and development. Here, the mind is both challenged and invited to play; I am inspired and just a little in awe of humanity’s creativity.
